Make sure that your final answer is founded on the reasoning steps you have taken so far."},{"role":"assistant","content":"Fae is a shumpus.\nAll shumpuses are numpuses.\nNumpuses are wumpuses.\nAll wumpuses are sterpuses.\nEvery sterpus is a brimpus.\nEvery brimpus is not kind.\nTherefore, based on the provided information, it can be concluded that Fae is not kind."}],"parents":[3],"children":[],"textembedding":[-0.056894027,-0.0011989556,-0.06689557,0.04886,0.075355895,-0.06607577,-0.048433702,-0.08348829,0.02805351,0.064403385,0.03436596,0.12939702,-0.07312604,0.013034798,-0.01742892,0.022347711,-0.03407083,0.082307786,-0.06640369,0.010042533,-0.15412214,0.061747234,-0.013059393,-0.09594923,0.035415303,0.02377416,-0.00072347233,-0.051352188,-0.018920952,0.023479033,0.024593959,-0.03957988,0.045088924,-0.023265885,-0.0362351,-0.036005557,0.06482968,-0.04699086,-0.105721235,0.0014377219,-0.009403091,-0.015986074,-0.05394275,0.1596312,-0.023806952,-0.10021219,0.009698218,-0.0013782865,0.049974926,0.07063385,-0.017986383,-0.048269745,0.087816834,0.05207361,0.043744456,0.027200919,-0.018871766,-0.11910035,0.03508738,-0.026725436,-0.059419006,-0.019871918,-0.11988735,0.05427067,0.019839127,0.008821034,0.02838143,0.03290672,0.022708423,-0.06099302,-0.036989316,0.01608445,-0.0052713053,-0.000030806495,0.068469584,0.09024344,0.114706226,0.021150805,0.020183442,-0.011124668,0.032152504,-0.0038612518,0.091751866,-0.09030902,0.08657074,0.065977395,-0.01938004,-0.14061186,0.08152078,0.0162894,0.06879751,0.037448402,-0.036530226,-0.063452415,-0.045056134,0.05020447,0.086898655,0.0134365,0.08762008,0.110246524,0.007132248,0.13215154,-0.094834305,-0.05407392,0.051319394,0.0095014665,-0.01298561,0.13549632,0.027168127,0.28725743,-0.028250262,-0.018822577,-0.059025504,-0.02838143,0.10663941,0.042334404,-0.0745033,-0.0071650404,-0.0114033995,0.062304698,0.049417462,0.010247483,-0.0145022385,0.011993654,-0.007197832,0.011264034,-0.008361946,0.05607423,-0.02100324,-0.13057753,-0.038464952,-0.0074683656,0.049384672,0.016100846,-0.04230161,0.009419487,-0.10559007,-0.013616855,-0.055418387,0.013952973,0.0032627985,-0.09942518,0.10493423,-0.03807145,0.0010708619,-0.026577873,-0.01762567,0.010329463,-0.006541993,-0.03534972,0.0382682,0.05295899,0.0403013,0.035644844,0.028889704,-0.0070338724,0.000048035075,-0.04230161,0.088407084,-0.00011195375
